world_definition.lore_text:
Welcome to AETHORIA — a continent shaped by ancient magic and forgotten wars.

Long ago, the Arcane Cataclysm tore the sky open for seven days and seven nights,
leaving behind ley-lines of wild mana that pulse through mountain, forest, and sea.
The Great Kingdoms rose and fell atop these ley-lines, and the scars of those
civilizations are still visible in crumbling ruins and cursed dungeons scattered
across the land.

Today, an uneasy peace holds among the city-states. Adventurers roam freely,
seeking fortune and glory — or simply trying to survive in a world where the next
monster, war, or natural disaster is never far away.

The current era is called the Age of Embers: old powers are fading, new ones are
rising, and destiny waits for those bold enough to seize it.

races.name: Human
races.description: Adaptable and ambitious. Humans are found everywhere and excel at nothing — except perseverance.

races.name: Elf
races.description: Long-lived and graceful. Elves carry centuries of wisdom in their eyes and a quiet sadness in their hearts.

races.name: Dwarf
races.description: Stout and stubborn. Dwarves are master craftsmen who remember every grudge ever dealt to their kin.

races.name: Halfling
races.description: Small but surprisingly resilient. Halflings have an almost supernatural talent for finding comfort in chaos.

races.name: Orc
races.description: Fierce warriors shaped by harsh lands. Orcs value strength and loyalty above all else.

races.name: Tiefling
races.description: Touched by infernal blood. Tieflings carry a stigma they did not choose and often forge their own path despite it.

races.name: Dragonborn
races.description: Descendants of dragons. Proud and powerful, they carry a primal fire within.

jobs.name: Warrior
jobs.description: Masters of the blade and shield, warriors charge headlong into battle and endure what others cannot.

jobs.name: Mage
jobs.description: Scholars of the arcane arts, mages wield reality-bending spells with intellect and force of will.

jobs.name: Rogue
jobs.description: Shadows in the night. Rogues survive on wit, speed, and a healthy disrespect for authority.

jobs.name: Healer
jobs.description: Channelers of divine or natural energy. Healers sustain their companions and mend wounds that would fell lesser folk.

jobs.name: Ranger
jobs.description: Children of the wild. Rangers read the land like a book and strike from distances their enemies can't match.

jobs.name: Merchant
jobs.description: The lifeblood of civilisation. Merchants turn profit from chaos and know the value of everything — and the price of everyone.

jobs.name: Paladin
jobs.description: Holy warriors bound by oath. Paladins blend divine magic with martial skill in service of a higher calling.

jobs.name: Bard
jobs.description: Wandering storytellers and musicians. Bards inspire allies, bewilder enemies, and always have a song for the occasion.

jobs.name: Druid
jobs.description: Guardians of nature's balance. Druids command the elements and commune with beasts and spirits.

jobs.name: Alchemist
jobs.description: Half-scientist, half-wizard. Alchemists brew potions and explosive concoctions that blur the line between art and danger.

site_seeds.name: Frostpeak Summit
site_seeds.description: A jagged mountain crowned with eternal ice.

site_seeds.name: The Grey Pass
site_seeds.description: A treacherous alpine pass haunted by wind spirits.

site_seeds.name: Skyveil Monastery
site_seeds.description: A cliffside monastery where monks study the ley-lines.

site_seeds.name: Ironvein Mine
site_seeds.description: A deep mine rich in enchanted ore — and old curses.

site_seeds.name: Stormwatch Keep
site_seeds.description: A fortress overlooking the northern sea.

site_seeds.name: Thornwood
site_seeds.description: A dense forest that hums with restless magic.

site_seeds.name: Ashenvale
site_seeds.description: Charred woodland recovering from a decade-old wildfire.

site_seeds.name: Silverbrook
site_seeds.description: A prosperous trading town built on a swift silver river.

site_seeds.name: Goblin Warrens
site_seeds.description: A network of tunnels teeming with mischievous creatures.

site_seeds.name: Eastwatch Tower
site_seeds.description: A lone watchtower staffed by a rotating ranger garrison.

site_seeds.name: Elderroot Forest
site_seeds.description: An ancient forest whose trees remember the Cataclysm.

site_seeds.name: Millhaven
site_seeds.description: A quiet farming village known for its legendary apple wine.

site_seeds.name: Aethoria Capital
site_seeds.description: The grand capital — heart of trade, politics, and intrigue.

site_seeds.name: Sunken Ruins
site_seeds.description: Ruins of a pre-Cataclysm city, half-swallowed by the earth.

site_seeds.name: Saltmarsh
site_seeds.description: A fishing village where sailors whisper of sea monsters.

site_seeds.name: Dragonbone Ridge
site_seeds.description: A ridge littered with the bones of ancient dragons.

site_seeds.name: Dusty Crossroads
site_seeds.description: A well-worn junction where merchants rest and rumours spread.

site_seeds.name: Hearthglow Town
site_seeds.description: A warm, welcoming town renowned for its healers' guild.

site_seeds.name: Mirefen Swamp
site_seeds.description: A murky swamp hiding both treasure and terrible dangers.

site_seeds.name: Dawnport
site_seeds.description: A busy harbour city that never truly sleeps.

site_seeds.name: Sunbaked Plains
site_seeds.description: Vast golden plains scorched by an unrelenting sun.

site_seeds.name: Sandstone Outpost
site_seeds.description: A small desert outpost at the edge of the known world.

site_seeds.name: The Verdant Vale
site_seeds.description: A lush valley sheltered from harsh winds — a true paradise.

site_seeds.name: Obsidian Crater
site_seeds.description: A massive crater from the Cataclysm, still faintly glowing.

site_seeds.name: Coral Cove
site_seeds.description: A hidden cove home to a secretive community of sea-mages.
